title: Landing page + waitlist email capture
acceptance_criteria: Route at /pricing in the frontend Vite app
Tier grid shows the unified spec tiers: Explorer ($0) / Trader ($49/mo) / Enterprise ($199/mo) / Whale (Custom)
Each tier card shows: price, target audience, 3-5 key features (per unified spec §2)
Each paid tier card has a 'Notify me when available' button (not 'Subscribe' — we don't accept payment yet)
Clicking the button opens an inline email input + submit
POST /api/v1/waitlist endpoint accepts {email, tier} and inserts into waitlist table
Waitlist table: id UUID PK, email TEXT NOT NULL, tier TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT DEFAULT 'pricing_page', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(email, tier)
Migration added to all 3 schema sources (scripts/init-trading-tables.sql + _INIT_DDL + _migrations)
Duplicate submission returns 200 (idempotent from user POV); log event waitlist.signup with tier
Basic email validation (regex, not MX lookup)
Page styling matches existing frontend patterns (Tailwind, uses tokens from the design pipeline)
Unit test for /api/v1/waitlist: happy path, duplicate, invalid email
LSP diagnostics clean on all changed files
non_goals: Account/login flows (that is Track A + C.04/D.05)
Email notification on signup — a subsequent subtask can add Mailchimp/Postmark
